name: Comment
goal: Surface a compact comment trigger that expands to an auto-growing textarea with debounced change events and configurable submit semantics.
description: Compact-by-default comment input. Collapsed: a small button. Clicking expands to a textarea that auto-grows between min-rows and max-rows by computed scrollHeight. Typing emits debounced ce-comment-change events; explicit submission (per submit-on) emits ce-comment-commit. Supports submit-on blur, enter, cmd-enter, or manual. Auto-collapses on submit unless submit-on=manual; Cancel and Escape collapse without committing.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Textarea placeholder; also used as aria-label.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Maximum character count; input is truncated to fit.

props.name: maxRows
props.description: Maximum auto-grow rows; beyond this the textarea scrolls.

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Debounce window for ce-comment-change after a keystroke.

events.name: ce-comment-change
events.description: Fires once per debounce window after the user types.

events.name: ce-comment-commit
events.description: Fires on explicit submit per submit-on rule.

events.name: ce-comment-expand
events.description: Fires when the panel expands or collapses.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bg-elevated
cssVariables.description: Trigger and textarea background; falls back to --ce-surface-2 / --ce-surface.

cssVariables.name: --ce-accent
cssVariables.description: Hover + focus accent; falls back to --ce-color-purple.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius-md
cssVariables.description: Trigger and textarea radius; falls back to --ce-radius-sm.

cssVariables.name: --ce-inset-sm
cssVariables.description: Textarea vertical padding; falls back to --ce-space-2.

sideEffects.reason: Cap event volume during fast typing without missing the final value.

a11y.notes: Trigger button has aria-expanded + aria-controls referencing the textarea id. Textarea has aria-label set from the placeholder and aria-live=off. Escape collapses; Enter or Cmd/Ctrl+Enter commit per submit-on rule.

nondeterministicReason: timer side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
